name: Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the milk and egg, then beat until well combined.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt. Mix into the creamed mixture until just moistened.
4. Toss the blueberries with 1 tablespoon of flour, then gently fold them into the batter.
5. Grease a muffin pan and fill each cavity about 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes.
Yield: 15 muffins
